'''Dorella''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Dorella system/Legends|Dorella system]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. It was one of the [[Freeworlds Territory]] and one of the [[Three Ellas]]. It had a liberal government that was looser about crime and [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggling]] than most Tapani worlds.

==Sources==
*<!-- 1997-07-28 -->''[[Lords of the Expanse]]''
